note: All records fetched this run (2026-07-04). Primary tool Google Patents (12 documents); after ~14 fetches GP began returning HTTP 503, so 11 further US full texts were fetched at FreePatentsOnline per playbook ladder 1.4 (GP canonical URLs in notes). TOP-UP same day: the GP outage lifted; the fusion-specific CN QPS citing cluster discovered in CN111541222A's citation lists was fetch-verified at GP and added as records 21-24 (CN112736841A, CN113097026B, CN114551187B, CN113257597A); CN111541222A itself was re-fetched (status re-confirmed). Dedupe by family: one row per family; 'family' carries only siblings displayed on the fetched page(s) - nothing inferred.

records.title: Quench protection in superconducting magnets
records.status_note: US grant active per FPO; WO sibling displays 'Ceased' on GP (national phase complete) - indicative
records.claim_theme: canary HTS sensing tape triggers energy dump
records.indep_claim_gist: Method: secondary HTS tape near but electrically insulated from primary HTS coil, engineered to stop superconducting at lower temperature; on detecting its loss of superconductivity, dump primary-coil energy into external resistive load.
records.notes: Family also fetched at GP: https://patents.google.com/patent/WO2017042541A1/en. Expiry est. ~2036 (US, 2015 priority + PTA). Fences the sacrificial-HTS-sensor modality; design-around = non-HTS sensing element. Blocks parts of U-022 instrument space.

records.title: Quench detection in superconducting magnets
records.status_note: Active per GP; anticipated expiration 2038-03-27 - indicative
records.claim_theme: striated multi-filament HTS probe tape raises detection voltage
records.indep_claim_gist: System: secondary HTS tape whose HTS layer is divided into strips connected in series along an open path (striated, high-sensitivity probe), detection unit identifying onset of superconductivity loss, protection unit dumping primary coil energy to external resistive load.
records.notes: Voltage-sensitivity amplification for noisy tokamak environments. Together with US11557893B2 fences engineered-sensor-tape QD. U-022.

records.title: Quench protection in high-temperature superconducting magnets
records.status_note: Recently granted (2026-02-24) per FPO; WO sibling displays 'Ceased' on GP - indicative
records.claim_theme: distributed fiber-optic quench detection; shield-as-shorted-secondary dump
records.indep_claim_gist: Method: plural optical fibres with every cable of the coil in thermal contact with at least one fibre; monitor backscattered light, compare wavelength changes across fibres to isolate localized temperature rise from global strain; determine quench from differential signal.
records.notes: Family fetched three ways: WO2018078327A1 at GP, US11776721B2 + US12562298B2 at FPO. US11776721B2 claim 1 differs: TF coil whose conductive neutron shield operates as magnetically coupled shorted secondary (passive dump). Fiber-QD-in-magnet method granted with term to ~2037 - central art against U-026 fiber instrument concepts.

records.title: Strain-or magnetic field-based quench detection
records.status_note: Active per GP; expires 2040-11-10 - indicative
records.claim_theme: pre-quench detection by comparing strain/field across NI-class coils
records.indep_claim_gist: Method: in a magnet of plural HTS field coils with conductive material enabling radial current sharing (NI/PI), monitor strain and/or magnetic field per coil, compare measurements between coils, determine quench likelihood from deviations; trigger protection.
records.notes: GP shows ~25-country family incl. CN114667579B. Claims the comparative Hall/strain route for NI/PI multi-coil systems - closest art to Hall-array QD instruments (U-022, U-025). Design-around: single-coil absolute-model detection, non-comparative estimators.

records.title: Quench protection in superconducting magnets
records.status_note: Granted; status line not displayed on fetched FPO page - indicative
records.claim_theme: TF coil with deliberately quenchable dump sections in return limbs
records.indep_claim_gist: Apparatus: TF coil with HTS central column; each return limb has a quenchable superconducting section between two HTS sections plus a quenching system; QPS detects quench and deliberately quenches those sections, dumping energy into thermally stable regions.
records.notes: Family/CPC not listed on fetched page (GP throttled at fetch time). Magnet-architecture protection - blocks in-magnet dump partitioning, not external electronics. U-025 context.

records.title: Quench protection of HTS superconducting magnets
records.assignee: Florida State University Research Foundation, Inc.
records.status_note: Status line not displayed on fetched FPO page; 20y from 2005-06-07 priority ran out in 2025 - estimate as expiring/expired, verify before reliance
records.claim_theme: heater elements embedded uniformly through HTS winding
records.indep_claim_gist: Method of constructing a superconducting coil: wind HTS layers and embed a plurality of heater elements substantially uniformly throughout the coil per predetermined distribution; system claims add quench detector driving the distributed heaters.
records.notes: Oldest HTS-specific QP art in set - distributed-heater approach enters public domain ~2025-26 (indicative). Expiry-horizon anchor.

records.title: Feedback control for no-insulation high-temperature superconducting magnet
records.assignee: Florida State University Research Foundation, Inc.
records.status_note: Granted, Active per GP (fetched at A-pub page showing grant chain) - indicative
records.claim_theme: field-feedback control cancels NI charging delay/instability
records.indep_claim_gist: Method: establish reference magnetic field, excite NI-HTS coil, monitor field difference, feedback-control power-supply current tracking to cut charging delay (~850 s to ~0.4 s demonstrated) and steady-state field instability.
records.notes: Claims PSU-side active management of NI coils - overlaps converter-firmware features for NI loads (U-025, U-016 seam). Design-around: current-profile feedforward without field feedback.

records.title: Frequency loss induced quench protection system for high temperature superconductors and associated method of use
records.assignee: Florida State University Research Foundation, Inc.
records.status_note: Active per GP; anticipated expiration 2038-10-22 - indicative
records.claim_theme: AC current-imbalance injection spreads quench heat in HTS coil (CLIQ analog)
records.indep_claim_gist: Method: couple current-imbalance source (high-impedance device, series capacitive element, switch across both) to a subsection of HTS magnet coil; operate source to induce imbalance whose AC losses heat the winding uniformly, controlling quench.
records.notes: HTS successor of CERN CLIQ; requires access to a coil subsection - a retrofit module driving only magnet end terminals sits outside this claim as read (counsel question). U-025.

records.title: AC-current induced quench protection system
records.status_note: Granted/Active per GP; anticipated expiration 2034-06-26 - indicative
records.claim_theme: CLIQ - AC injection quenches magnet fast and volumetrically
records.indep_claim_gist: Apparatus: means providing AC current of predetermined strength/frequency with control terminal receiving quench signal; on activation AC flows through superconductor with parameters selected to trigger superconducting-to-normal transition (coupling-loss heating).
records.notes: LHC-era CLIQ patent (Datskov/Kirby/Ravaioli). EP-only grant seen; expiry 2034. Productized dump-by-quench features must be read against this + FSU US11217373B2.

records.title: Distributed-sensor quench detection method for superconducting devices
records.status_note: Granted 2024-07-30 per FPO - indicative
records.claim_theme: pressure-wave sensor array in coolant detects and locates quench
records.indep_claim_gist: System: enclosure, coolant fluid, superconducting element, and sensor array detecting events from pressure waves generated by temperature changes and transmitted through the coolant; locates quench without voltage taps.
records.notes: MIT TLO lists as licensable. Fences acoustic/hydraulic modality for immersed/indirectly-cooled systems; dry conduction-cooled NI pancakes without coolant column arguably outside literal scope (counsel question). U-022. Only detection-electronics-adjacent MIT/CFS-lineage grant found; CFS itself shows no QD/QPS electronics filings (bounded absence).

records.title: Quench Detection System for Superconducting Magnets
records.status_note: 2013 application; grant/abandonment not displayed on fetched page - treat as unresolved, verify
records.claim_theme: integrated FPGA QD instrument: thresholds, logging, dump, PSU kill
records.indep_claim_gist: Method: receive real-time electrical data from superconducting device, flag quench when voltage thresholds persist over defined timeframes; system performs transient logging, dump-resistor activation, and power-supply termination within 1-5 ms.
records.notes: Closest published claim set to a standalone QD+protection INSTRUMENT (U-022, U-023) - but voltage-only, single modality, lab-system framing. If never granted it becomes prior art only (helps freedom, hurts novelty of naive voltage-threshold instruments).

records.title: Arrangement, system, and method of interrupting current
records.status_note: WO displays 'Ceased' (national phase complete); US/EP/CN/JP/KR siblings granted per GP family line - indicative
records.claim_theme: VARC: VSC-excited resonant branch forces current zero in mechanical breaker
records.indep_claim_gist: Arrangement: three parallel branches - mechanical breaker, energy absorber, resonant circuit in series with controllable voltage source injecting energy to grow oscillating current until amplitude exceeds main current, creating artificial zero-crossing for interruption.
records.notes: VARC breaker family (grid-oriented). Any 0.5-20 kA magnet dump switch using VSC-assisted resonance must be read against this; CN sibling CN106537544B extends coverage to China. U-024, U-016.

records.title: Quench protection arrangement
records.assignee: Oxford Nanoscience Ltd (formerly Oxford Instruments Nanotechnology Tools Ltd)
records.status_note: Active per GP; expires 2041-03-14 - indicative
records.claim_theme: varistors across magnet sections trigger heater-spread quench
records.indep_claim_gist: Arrangement: plural magnet sections, varistor in parallel across each, heater arrangement applying heat to every section in response to voltage change across any varistor (nonlinear elements give higher trigger voltage at low current than resistors).
records.notes: Lab-magnet (LTS/MRI-class) hybrid; CN family member CN114641838B. Low relevance to NI/HTS fusion electronics but active to 2041.

records.title: Quench Protection System for a Superconducting Magnet
records.status_note: Granted as GB2514372B per GP - indicative
records.claim_theme: Lorentz-force-deployed movable heater spreads quench
records.notes: Abstract depth. Retrofittable quench-spread heater; GB-only footprint seen. Illustrates OI's incumbent MRI/lab posture.

records.title: Quench energy dissipation for superconducting magnets
records.status_note: Status line not displayed on fetched FPO page - indicative
records.claim_theme: dual superconducting switches route quench energy to external resistor
records.notes: Abstract depth. MRI-era external-dump plumbing; in-cryostat switch based, no converter claim. Expiry est. 2030-31 - indicative.

records.title: Quench protection apparatus for superconducting magnet system
records.status_note: Granted 2020-03-10 per FPO - indicative
records.claim_theme: economical M-of-N heater matrix quenches all coils simultaneously
records.indep_claim_gist: Apparatus: N series superconducting coils + heater matrix of heater units in parallel with each coil; M units hold >=N heaters with every coil thermally coupled to heaters from all M units (2xN/3xN instead of NxN matrix) for simultaneous all-coil quench spread.
records.notes: GE China-origin family (CN priority 201410554507.1; CN publication number not shown on fetched page). Observed H10N60/355 - live H10N60/3xx code on quench art (CPC pass datapoint). MRI-class.

records.title: Detection apparatus and method for superconducting coil quench
records.status_note: Granted 2013-03-26 per FPO; term est. to ~2029-30 - indicative
records.claim_theme: bridge-circuit imbalance QD sampled in low-noise hold periods
records.indep_claim_gist: Apparatus: bridge circuit formed by coil pair with midpoint resistor; measures imbalance voltage and extracts signals during constant-energy hold periods to reject charge/discharge switching noise before flagging quench.
records.notes: Canonical bridge-balance QD art (JP layer). Anticipates bridge+comparator schemes of the type CS-H reports Startorus is filing (Startorus application itself not locatable on GP this run). Hold-period-sampling limitation = design-around seam for continuous detection.

records.title: Superconducting magnet system and quench protection circuit thereof
records.assignee: Huazhong University of Science and Technology (华中科技大学)
records.status_note: Granted 2024-01-09 per FPO - indicative
records.claim_theme: energy transfer to thermal shield during quench (MRI/NMR)
records.indep_claim_gist: Circuit: superconducting unit of M series coils, switch across first/last terminals protected by first diode-integrated element, LTS switch, and thermal shields paralleled with symmetric coil subsets that absorb transferred magnetic energy during quench.
records.notes: CN-origin family (CN priority + PCT/CN route shown on fetched page; cites CN102214911A, CN110571011A). CN university art crossing to US jurisdiction; MRI/NMR scope.

records.title: Quench protection switch for magnet power supply system of high-power tokamak device
records.title_zh: 一种大功率托卡马克装置磁体电源系统的失超保护开关
records.assignee: Nanjing Institute of Technology (南京工程学院)
records.status_note: Granted CN111541222B 2022-06-17; Active, anticipated expiration 2040-06-05 per GP (re-fetched 2026-07-04 top-up) - indicative
records.claim_theme: 3-stage hybrid QPS switch: mechanical + solid-state + energy-transfer resistor
records.indep_claim_gist: QPS switch with three-stage current-carrying branches: multi-break high-speed mechanical switch with artificial current-zero circuit, solid-state breaker (thyristor/diode), and energy-transfer resistor; arc-free, bidirectional turn-off, no fuse replacement after action.
records.notes: CN-market blocking for hybrid dump switches (U-024). Its Cited-By cluster (fusion QPS switchgear 2020-2023) was fetch-verified in the 2026-07-04 top-up: CN112736841A (NJIT), CN113097026B + CN114551187B (HFIPS), CN113257597A (Tsinghua, rejected) - records 21-24 of this file.

records.title: Superconducting magnet quench protection device
records.title_zh: 一种超导磁体失超保护装置
records.assignee: Institute of Electrical Engineering, Chinese Academy of Sciences (中国科学院电工研究所)
records.status_note: Displays 'Expired - Fee Related' on GP - displays as expired, verify before reliance
records.claim_theme: series heater circuit + central voltage QD quenches all coils simultaneously
records.notes: Abstract depth. MRI/NMR-era CAS art; lapsed for fees - marks aging-out of first-generation CN QP filings (priority 2011). Cited by HUST US11869709B2 (as CN102214911A).

records.title: Hybrid direct-current switch for fully-superconducting tokamak quench protection
records.title_zh: 全超导托卡马克失超保护混合式直流开关 (as rendered on GP)
records.assignee: Nanjing Institute of Technology (南京工程学院)
records.status_note: Application pending as displayed on GP (fetched 2026-07-04 top-up) - claims can change
records.claim_theme: 3-stage-commutation hybrid DC switch + explosion-switch backup for tokamak QPS
records.indep_claim_gist: Hybrid DC switch: current-carrying fast mechanical switch, commutation unit of two transfer branches (low/high-voltage solid-state switches sharing diode valve groups with current-sharing inductors), dump resistor, and backup explosion switch; bidirectional turn-off without current-direction sensing.
records.notes: NJIT's follow-on to CN111541222A (citing doc, fetched from its Cited-By). CN fence risk for hybrid dump-switch products if granted (U-024); pending A-pub. Fetched page also lists later citing docs (IGBT-paralleling, generator-breaker art) - cluster saturating on switchgear themes.

records.title: Multi-voltage adjustable blasting (pyro) circuit breaker for fusion reactor mainframe
records.title_zh: 聚变堆主机用多电压可调式爆破断路器 (as rendered on GP)
records.assignee: Hefei Institutes of Physical Science, CAS (中国科学院合肥物质科学研究院, HFIPS)
records.status_note: Granted 2023-12-19, Active per GP; anticipated expiration 2041-04-06 - indicative
records.claim_theme: RDX-driven pyrobreaker, 100 kA / 20 kV class, microsecond breaking, adjustable voltage
records.indep_claim_gist: Blasting circuit breaker for fusion-reactor final-stage magnet protection: explosion-impact isolation unit plus blasting breaking unit using RDX charges; double arc-shaped reflection structures and multi-stage arc-extinguishing grids synchronize simultaneous breaking; voltage isolation adjustable to 20 kV at 100 kA without structural change.
records.notes: HFIPS fencing the pyro-backup (explosion switch) layer of fusion QPS in CN to 2041 - the CRAFT/BEST 定型产品 seam (U-024). Cites older explosion-breaker art (displayed on fetched page). Any CN-facing pyro-backup product needs claim-chart depth here - counsel question.

records.title: Fusion device quench protection system DC circuit breaker
records.title_zh: 聚变装置失超保护系统直流断路器 (as rendered on GP)
records.assignee: Hefei Institutes of Physical Science, CAS (中国科学院合肥物质科学研究院, HFIPS)
records.status_note: Granted 2023-10-13, Active per GP; anticipated expiration 2042-01-28 (filing date per displayed expiration) - indicative
records.claim_theme: water-cooled 50 kA steady-state DC breaker for fusion QPS; arc grids + EM actuation
records.indep_claim_gist: DC circuit breaker for fusion QPS: commutation unit with moving/static contacts, arc-extinguishing system with guided arc paths and grids, electromagnetic-coil mechanical unit with manual and remote operation; circulating deionized-water cooling enabling long-term steady-state 50 kA carry.
records.notes: HFIPS fencing the steady-state kA mechanical-breaker layer (EAST/CFETR/BEST ecosystem) to 2042. Together with CN113097026B: institute owns switch + backup layers while no merchant 定型产品 exists (U-024) - design-arounds: vacuum-breaker + artificial-zero routes (cf. CN111541222A, WO2016003357A1).

records.title: Hybrid direct current breaker based on composite current conversion mode and control method thereof
records.title_zh: 基于复合换流方式的混合式直流断路器及其控制方法
records.status_note: REJECTED after substantive examination 2022-07-22 as displayed on GP - claims dead, prior art only
records.claim_theme: composite (natural+forced) commutation hybrid DC breaker, three parallel branches
records.indep_claim_gist: Hybrid DC breaker: main mechanical-switch branch, two transfer branches (solid-state modules with energy absorption), energy-consumption branch with metal-oxide varistors; sequential natural-then-forced commutation yields near-zero conduction loss and arc-free breaking.
records.notes: Citing doc of CN111541222A (grid/DC-breaker domain). Rejected 2022 - functions as prior art narrowing what commutation-sequence claims remain available in CN; useful design-freedom datapoint for U-024/U-016 dump-switch work (not a legal conclusion).
